$ratingId..write: auth != null && (auth.token.email == 's2shug@gmail.com' || (!data.exists() && newData.child('ownerUid').val() == auth.uid && newData.child('score').isNumber() && newData.child('score').val() >= 1 && newData.child('score').val() <= 5 && newData.child('comment').isString() && newData.child('comment').val().length <= 1000 && newData.child('author').isString() && newData.child('author').val().length <= 30 && newData.child('createdAt').isNumber()))
